extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store and toolbar.

extDescription.message: Unlock DevTools on sites that block debugging (e.g. disable-devtool): stop forced reloads, page wipes, and detection.
extDescription.description: Short description for the Chrome Web Store listing.

popupSubtitle.message: Bypass anti-debug scripts such as disable-devtool and restore normal DevTools use.

popupHint.message: Applies to this site only (including cross-origin video iframes on this page). The page reloads after you toggle. Injected at document_start (MAIN world).
popupHint.description: Help text at the bottom of the popup.

popupSiteUnsupported.message: This page is not supported (open a normal web page)
popupSiteUnsupported.description: Shown when the active tab is not http(s).

popupUseOnWebpage.message: Use the toggle on a normal web page
popupUseOnWebpage.description: Status when toggle is disabled on unsupported pages.

popupStatusOn.description: Status when unlock is on for the current site.

popupStatusOnWithEmbeds.message: Unlock enabled for this site ($COUNT$ embed host(s))
popupStatusOnWithEmbeds.description: Status when unlock is on and embed hosts were collected.

popupStatusOff.description: Status when unlock is off for the current site.

popupStatusOnGeneric.description: Generic on status without a host.

popupStatusOffGeneric.description: Generic off status without a host.

popupReloadReloading.description: Status after toggle when reload started.

popupReloadSkipped.message: $PREFIX$; refresh a normal web page to apply
